name.ja: <ruby>魔救の輝跡<rt>アダマシア・ルミナス</rt></ruby>

text.en:
2 Effect Monsters, including a Synchro Monster
If this card is Link Summoned, or a monster(s) is Special Summoned to a zone(s) this card points to: You can target 1 monster in your field or GY that has a Level; Special Summon 1 "Glimmer Token" (Rock/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level. When another monster on the field activates its effect (Quick Effect): You can place it on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Luminous" once per turn.

materials: 2 Effect Monsters, including a Synchro Monster
